playbook.intent: Each active client receives a 5-10 min status note before noon Monday: what shipped last week, what's next, blockers, expected hours. Done = all active clients pinged, replies tracked, week's plan adjusted.
playbook.scope: Each active client receives a 5-10 min status note before noon Monday: what shipped last week, what's next, blockers, expected hours. Done = all active clients pinged, replies tracked, week's plan adjusted.

success-criteria.criterion: Prepare stage complete: Draft updates per client (4-line max)
Send stage complete: Updates sent log
Adapt stage complete: Updated weekly plan

stage.name: Prepare
stage.intent: By Sunday evening, draft Monday updates per active client.

tasks.task: Per client: collect last-week shipped + this-week plan + blockers
Draft 5-10 min status note per client

stage.decision-gate: Advance once every active client has a draft. No blanks.

stage.name: Send
stage.intent: All updates out before noon Monday.

tasks.task: Send updates via each client's preferred channel

stage.decision-gate: Advance once 100% of active clients pinged before noon.

stage.name: Adapt
stage.intent: Use replies to adjust this week's plan.

tasks.task: Log new blockers in personal CRM

stage.decision-gate: Cycle closes only after every reply is acknowledged within 24h.

extra.value: [Hiring employees or building a team — solo operator throughout, Enterprise procurement processes — SMB / startup buyers only]
[Active freelance practice with at least one paying client, A bookkeeping / time-tracking baseline in place]
[Treating decision_gate as a suggestion — playbook collapses to a checklist if gates are not enforced, Skipping written artifacts because 'it's in my head' — kills traceability and future re-use]
['Did every stage produce a written artifact a stranger could read?', 'Did I actually advance only when the decision_gate criterion was met?']

{human: faion get-content monday-client-checkin-cycle --format md, agent: faion get-content monday-client-checkin-cycle --format context, json: faion get-content monday-client-checkin-cycle --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: 'Initial draft for F-064 P3 technical-freelancer persona, atomic angle'}]
